description_long: This is a modern, minimalist desk lamp with a conical metal shade and a slender cylindrical stand mounted on a round, flat base. The lamp features a matte black finish with subtle metallic accents at the joint where the shade meets the vertical support. A visible power cord extends from the rear of the lamp head, trailing down the back of the stand. The lamp's shade is angled downward, designed to direct light onto a work surface, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy yet elegant build. The lamp's design is functional, with clean lines and a utilitarian aesthetic suitable for contemporary urban environments. The lamp likely uses a single bulb housed within the conical shade.
description: A sleek, black conical-shaded desk lamp with a cylindrical stand and round base, featuring metallic accents and a visible power cord. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the conical shade facing forward, the cylindrical stand, and the round base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled shade, metallic joint, and the power cord trailing down the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the conical shade, the vertical support, and the cord attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the shade angled downward and the power cord more visible along the stand.
